title: wedplan
summary: A beautiful, interactive wedding seating planner with AI-powered optimization. Drag-and-drop table management, guest group constraints, and a CP-SAT solver to find the perfect seating arrangement. !Wedding Seating PlannerINTERFACE.png bash git clone httpsgithub.comyourusernamewedplan.git cd wedplan uv sync bun install or npm install bash uv run fastapi dev backendwedplanapimain.py
